title: bridge-matrix: axum::serve .expect() panics spawned task silently
description: bridge-matrix/src/bridge.rs:179-181: `axum::serve(...).await.expect("AS HTTP server terminated unexpectedly")` is inside a `tokio::spawn` block. If axum::serve returns an error, the panic kills only the spawned task — the bridge's main loop keeps running, but the Matrix AS endpoint is no longer serving. Operator sees no indication of failure. Fix: replace `.expect()` with `.unwrap_or_else(|e| tracing::error!("AS HTTP server error: {e}"))` or propagate through a channel so the main task can exit cleanly.
